# Environment Variables for Routed Application

DEV_MODE=True
SECRET_KEY=change_me

# Database Configuration
POSTGRES_USER=routed_user
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=routed_password
POSTGRES_DB=routed
POSTGRES_HOST=127.0.0.1
POSTGRES_PORT=5432
# Optional: if you prefer a single URL, fill this and your app can read it.
DATABASE_URL=

# Backend
LOG_LEVEL=INFO
PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
RESET_DB_ON_STARTUP=False

# Frontend
VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8000
